title: Corporate Finance Manager
description:
The Team 

Our Corporate Finance team is focused on assisting diverse client base with their M&A and capital raising requirements. The role provides opportunity to work in a dynamic environment and collaborate with other Grant Thornton advisory teams across Singapore and region. 

Responsibilities 

  • Lead and be responsible for detailed financial analysis and modelling for M&A and capital raising transactions.

  • Lead, review and approve company valuations using various methods, including discounted cash flow (DCF), comparable company analysis, and precedent transactions. 

  • Lead the preparation, review and finalisation of pitch decks, proposals, presentations, and investment memorandums for internal and external stakeholders.

  • Oversee and manage due diligence processes by directing the gathering, analysing, and interpretation of financial data, and identifying key risks and issues. 

  • Drive company, industry, market and valuation research to support transaction execution and strategic recommendations. 

  • Lead and manage the execution of corporate finance transactions, including coordinating with clients, investors and other stakeholders. 

  • Supervise, coach and review the work of associates and senior associates to ensure quality delivery and development of the team. 

Qualifications 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.

  • At least 5 years of M&A and/or capital raising deal experience in corporate finance, investment banking, or financial consulting. 

  • Strong financial modeling skills and proficiency with valuation techniques. 

  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, communication and presentation skills, with the ability to convey financial concepts to diverse stakeholders.

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and financial analysis tools. 

  • Ability to work well in a team-oriented, fast-paced environment. 

  • Detail-oriented with strong organisational skills.

postedCompany.description:
Grant Thornton is a global professional service network of more than 73,000 people in 150 markets. Our team in Singapore is growing rapidly and we know this success is made possible by our people. That’s why we make sure our people have the right tools and environment to thrive.

Each individual at Grant Thornton Singapore is empowered to be themselves within an inclusive team. Our supportive structure gives our people the autonomy to shape their careers and drive positive change in the firm. It’s an exciting time to join us as we grow with organisations of all sizes and industries in Singapore, across the region and in the world.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity firm where we celebrate what makes our employees unique. We are committed to nurturing our inclusive workplace and strongly encourage people from all backgrounds and walks of life to discover more about us.
postedCompany.name: GRANT THORNTON SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED
